daiquiri-cocktail.name: Daiquiri Cocktail
instructions: Combine light rum, lime juice, and simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Add ice, cover and shake until chilled. Strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

dairy-free-chowder.name: Dairy-free Chowder

ingredients.prep: peeled and diced, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat 1/4 cup oil a large pot over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and bacon to hot oil; cook and stir until bacon fat renders and onion is translucent, about 5 minutes. Add potatoes and clam juice. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil. Cook until potatoes are fork-tender, 15 to 20 minutes. Add clams and cook for 10 minutes more.

Meanwhile, combine remaining 1/4 cup oil and flour in a separate saucepan over medium heat. Stir until paste-like and light golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes. Gradually whisk in almond milk; cook and stir until mixture becomes a thick slurry, 6 to 7 minutes more.
Stir slurry into clam chowder until thickened. Season with salt and pepper; serve hot.

dak-juk.name: Dak Juk

ingredients.item: Short- or medium-grain rice or glutinous rice
. diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Separate white and light green parts from 1 scallion and place in a medium pot; reserve dark green part for another use. Thinly slice all of remaining 2 scallions; set aside.

Add 5 garlic cloves, one 1"-piece ginger, peeled, thinly sliced, 1 lb. skinless, boneless chicken breasts (about 4 small; if using large breasts, cut in half first), and 5 cups water to pot with scallion. Bring to a vigorous boil; remove from heat. Cover; let sit 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, rinse 1 cup short- or medium-grain rice or glutinous rice in a medium bowl in several changes of water until water almost runs clear, 2–3 times. Drain and set aside.

Using tongs, transfer chicken and garlic in poaching liquid to a cutting board; let cool. Strain poaching liquid through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl (you should have about 5 cups); discard solids.

Heat 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame oil in a medium heavy pot over medium. Add rice and toss until each grain is toasted and coated with oil, about 1 minute. Add 1 medium carrot, peeled, finely chopped, and 1 large shallot, finely chopped, season with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper, and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallot is translucent, about 2 minutes. Stir in reserved poaching liquid, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 2 cups water. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, partially cover with a lid, and simmer, stirring occasionally to keep from sticking, until juk is creamy and porridge-like, 25–30 minutes. (If it becomes too thick, stir in more water ¼ cup at a time.)

Meanwhile, shred chicken, then mash garlic with the flat side of a chef’s knife. Combine chicken, garlic, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame oil, and remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl; season with pepper.

Remove juk from heat; stir in half of chicken and most of reserved sliced scallions. Ladle into bowls. Top each with a bit of remaining chicken and scallions. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds, season with pepper, and drizzle with soy sauce and sesame oil.

dandelion-jelly.name: Dandelion Jelly
instructions: Heat water in a large pot until simmering. Add 2 cups dandelion petals; simmer for 10 minutes. Remove petals with a slotted spoon and strain over a bowl; squeeze out as much liquid from them as possible. Discard petals. Repeat with remaining 2 cups petals.

Measure out 3 cups of dandelion-infused water, adding tap water to make up the difference if needed, and pour into a large pot. Add lemon juice, pectin, and yellow food coloring; bring to a rolling boil. Add sugar; return to a boil. Cook, stirring constantly, about 1 minute. Remove from heat and skim foam off the surface if needed.

Pour mixture into hot, sterilized jars, filling to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a clean knife or thin spatula around the insides of the jars to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any residue. Top with lids and screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large pot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars, 2 inches apart, into the boiling water using a holder. Pour in more boiling water if necessary to bring the water level to at least 1 inch above the tops of the jars. Bring the water to a rolling boil, cover the pot, and process for 7 minutes.
Remove the jars from the pot and place on a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart. Press the top of each lid with a finger, ensuring that the seal is tight. Let cool, about 24 hours.

dark-choco-bliss.name: Dark Choco Bliss
instructions: {'level': 'Combine tapioca and chia seeds in a pot and cover with water; let soak until thickened and gelatinous, at least 1 hour.', 'number': '1'}

{'level': 'Mix coconut milk, palm sugar, cocoa powder, arrowroot powder, and salt into tapioca mixture; cook and stir over medium heat until desired thickness is reached, 10 to 15 minutes.', 'number': '2'}
{'level': 'Remove saucepan from heat and stir vanilla into the pudding.', 'number': '3'}

delicata-squash-carbonara.name: Delicata Squash Carbonara

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Halve squash lengthwise, scrape out seeds, and slice crosswise into ¼”-thick half-moons. Toss with oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper.

Arrange squash slices on a wire rack set inside a large rimmed baking sheet; place pancetta on rack next to squash. Roast until squash is tender, hasn’t taken any color, and still holds its shape, and pancetta is browned all over (when pressed, it should feel like a well-done steak), 30–35 minutes. Transfer squash to a platter; set aside.

Let pancetta cool slightly, then cut into ¼” pieces. Pour any rendered fat in baking sheet into a large skillet. Add pancetta and cook over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until crisp, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer pancetta to a small bowl. Reserve skillet with drippings.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking liquid.
Add pasta to reserved skillet along with ½ cup pasta cooking liquid and toss to coat, scraping up any browned bits stuck to the bottom of the skillet with a wooden spoon.

Lightly beat egg yolks and lemon zest in a large bowl just to combine. Working quickly, add hot pasta to egg mixture and toss vigorously with tongs until a thick, glossy sauce forms, about 4 minutes. (If sauce still looks watery, keep tossing.)
Add pancetta and reserved squash to pasta, season with salt and pepper, and toss everything together.
Shave Pecorino over pasta and top with more pepper just before serving.

delicious-chicken-thighs-glazed-with-ora.name: Delicious Chicken Thighs Glazed With Orange And Ginger
delicious-chicken-thighs-glazed-with-ora.original_name: Ricos muslos de pollo glaseados con naranja y jengibre
instructions: Do some cuts to the thighs so they impregnate with all the flavour while cooking.
Sazona con sal y pimienta.
Calienta una cazuela con aceite de oliva y sella los muslos por ambos lados. Esto te puede tomar como unos 12 minutos.
Pour the orange juice, ginger and english sauce. Mix, cover and let low-heat cook for 15 minutes till the liquid and frosted form.
Dale la vuelta a los muslos para que se impregnen de toda la salsa, sube el fuego hasta que el pollo quede glaseado.
Once ready, join with your favorite garrison.
Enjoy!

delicious-chicken-tinga-flautas-comedera.name: Delicious Chicken Tinga Flautas
delicious-chicken-tinga-flautas-comedera.original_name: Deliciosas flautas de tinga de pollo
instructions: He steals chicken breasts in abundant water and when they are soft leave them to rest and shattering.
In a blender, add an aprobado chipotle chili, tomato, polished garlic teeth and salt to taste. Do your best till you have a homogenous salsa.
Warm up a frying pan with some vegetable oil and spray the onion till clear.
Swallow the salsa, have a few with a dry oregano. Mix and cook with medium heat for 10 minutes or till thick.
Pasado este tiempo, incorpora el pollo deshebrado y mezcla. Cocina por 5 minutos. Apaga y deja que repose.
When the chicken tit's at temperature, put a portion into each omelette and put them up. Hold with chopsticks.
Warm a frying pan with abundant vegetable oil and fry the flutes till they are well golden.
Listen to them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil.
Serve them and enjoy with your favorite garrison.

delicious-milk-buns-comedera.name: Delicious Milk Buns

ingredients.item: 30 g of glass or snow sugar

instructions: In a pot we heat up the milk and dilute the yeast, when you see that it's completely dissolved, put out and let it cool to an room temperature.

In a bowl, we put the flour and salt, we scramble till they join. We open up a space as if it were a volcano, we add three eggs, then gradually incorporates milk with the yeast (remember that it should be room temperature).
With the help of a scatula, stir with wrapped movements, when you see that the mass is dense, use your hands to finish integrating up with a homogenous mass.

Filling up your cover and place the dough. Stretch and at this point you will add butter and amasas for 10 minutes. Do not worry if, at first, the mass becomes sticky, after its amasing will be manageable.
Do your dough a ball, we put it in a bowl, we cover it with a clean cloth and we leave for 2 hours to ferment.
After this time, our mass will have grown. We'll get them and put them in our counter and we'll have them amassed for 3 minutes to get them out of the air.

Later, we'll put our milk balls together. We'll divide mass into equal portions. I recommend that you do every pint the size of a medium apple. Of this amount, about 10 portions will come out. You can make them round or oval but small.
We place our milk pits on a plate with waxed paper and leave them for 2 hours for their second fermentation process.
10 minutes to complete the fermentation, preheat the oven at 190 degrees Celsius.
Beat the egg that's left to brush every pint of milk. The varnish all, and then you sprinkle the glass or snow sugar. That step will help them form that bright and golden color.
Input them into the oven for 15 minutes, until they are completely soft, fluffy and doradite.
We're done!

dessert-with-cream-cheese-and-strawberry.name: Dessert With Cream Cheese And Strawberry Coulis
dessert-with-cream-cheese-and-strawberry.original_name: Επιδόρπιο με τυρί κρέμα και κουλί φράουλας

ingredients.item: A few drops of lemon juice
A few drops of lemon juice

instructions: Add the cream cheese, cold cream, sugar, vanilla, lemon and zest in a bowl.
Beat them with a hand mixer at low speed for 1 minute.
Strengththen and beat for 1 minute more until the cream dickens and stabilizes.
Place the mixture in a pastry frame with a nick nose and keep it in the refrigerator until serving.

diabetic-cinnamon-cake-lezzet.name: Diabetic Cinnamon Cake

ingredients.item: Half water glass light sump Tags

2. Add biscuits by melt the butter and share the muffin molds by snacks them on their soles.
3. Cream cheese with sweeteners thoroughly fresand.
4. Egg, starch, cinnamon, add and mix vanilla.
5. Share the mixture into muffin molds and cook for 25-30 minutes in the oven set to 160 degrees.
6. From the oven to the room heat.
7. Cool 2 hours in refrigerator.
8. Milk with cream schling; up to join frremove.
9. Every one's u creamy until 1 dessert spoon to the car pour and sued with fresh min; fortune by serving.

digaag-qumbe-yogurt-coconut-chicken.name: Digaag Qumbe (yogurt-coconut Chicken)

ingredients.prep: seeds and membranes removed, coarsely chopped
seeds removed if you want less heat, coarsely chopped
boneless chicken thighs, cut into 1" pieces

instructions: Blend tomatoes, bell pepper, and jalapeños in a blender or food processor until almost smooth; set aside.

Heat oil in a large pot over medium. Add onion and garlic and cook, stirring often, until beginning to soften, about 5 minutes. Add ginger, cumin, curry powder, turmeric, and cardamom; season generously with salt. Cook, stirring, until very fragrant, about 1 minute. Add reserved tomato mixture to pot and stir well to combine. Stir in yogurt and tomato paste, cover pot, and simmer 10 minutes. Add potato and carrot and continue to cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are nearly tender, 15–18 minutes.
Add chicken, coconut milk, ghee (if using), and 1 cup cilantro. Stir to combine, then simmer until chicken is tender and sauce thickens, about 20 minutes. Season with salt.
Divide rice among bowls. Spoon chicken, vegetables, and sauce over. Top with cilantro leaves.

dirt-pudding.name: Dirt Pudding
instructions: Whisk milk and pudding mix in a large bowl until softly set, about 2 minutes. The pudding will thicken as it stands.
Beat confectioners' sugar, cream cheese, and butter in a separate bowl until smooth and creamy.
Stir cream cheese mixture into pudding until thoroughly combined; gently fold in frozen whipped topping.
Place 1/2 of the cookie crumbs into the bottom of a 9x12-inch dish; spread evenly.
Cover cookie crumbs with pudding mixture and top with remaining crumbs, covering completely.
Chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.

dirty-rice-with-black-eyed-peas.name: Dirty Rice With Black-eyed Peas

ingredients.prep: white and green parts separated, thinly sliced
ribs and seeds removed, finely chopped

instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high. Cook chicken liver and ground beef, stirring occasionally, until brown, 5–8 minutes. Add onion, scallion whites, bell pepper, celery, and garlic and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft, 6–8 minutes. Add bay leaves, Cajun spice seasoning, and cayenne, and cook, stirring, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add brandy, scraping up any brown bits on the bottom of the pot with a wooden spoon. (You can use 2 Tbsp. water if you want to skip the brandy). Add rice and cook, stirring often, until some grains are translucent, about 3 minutes.

Add black-eyed peas and broth, season with salt and black pepper, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover saucepan, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 15–18 minutes. Remove pan from heat, add peas and butter, and fluff rice with a fork. Cover pan and let sit 10 minutes.
Taste rice and season with more salt if needed. Transfer to a platter and top with scallion green.

drawn-butter.name: Drawn Butter
instructions: Melt butter in the top of a double boiler over barely simmering water, 5 to 7 minutes.
Set melted butter aside to cool slightly, then skim foam off the top and discard. Allow butter to solidify, 8 hours to overnight.
Drain off any liquid that is collected at the bottom. Transfer butter to a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl and microwave until melted. Pour into individual bowls to serve.
